feed.title: Educational Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Educational Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Translanguaging ideology? Scholars’ and practitioners’ discourses in a foreign-language education context
entry.summary: Authors: Tomoko Tode, Kojiro Hozawa DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eduling-2025-0008 Pages: Page range: 1-30

entry.title: A multidimensional analysis of university students’ everyday reading and writing
entry.summary: Authors: Brett Hashimoto DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eduling-2025-0010 Pages: Page range: 31-69

entry.title: Assessing intercultural communicative competence: internet memes for telecollaboration
entry.summary: Authors: Lidiia Shepelytska DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eduling-2025-0026 Pages: Page range: 70-92

entry.title: Deferred epistemologies: cyclical theory importation and knowledge governance in China’s foreign language education in schools
entry.summary: Authors: Hao Xu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eduling-2025-0014 Pages: Page range: 93-114

entry.title: An interview with David Block
entry.summary: Authors: William Simpson, Jérémie Bouchard DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/eduling-2025-0022 Pages: Page range: 115-126
